message:
style(node): rustfmt push_bounded call sites across 119 modules

Apply rustfmt's preferred multi-line formatting to push_bounded() calls
throughout the codebase. The previous single-line style exceeded the
100-column line limit when the struct literal or capacity constant name
was long enough; rustfmt now splits these into:

    push_bounded(
        &mut self.collection,
        StructType { field: value, ... },
        MAX_CAPACITY,
    );

This is a purely mechanical formatting change with zero semantic impact.
No logic, control flow, or data structures were modified.

Affected module groups:
- api/ (compat_gate, middleware)
- claims/ (claim_compiler)
- connector/ (activation_pipeline, bocpd, cancel_injection_gate,
  cancellation_protocol, canonical_serializer, capability_guard,
  claim_compiler, control_evidence, control_evidence_replay,
  diagnostic_registry, dpor_schedule_gate, durability,
  ecosystem_compliance, ecosystem_registry, ecosystem_reputation,
  eviction_saga, execution_scorer, incident_bundle_retention,
  lease_service, n_version_oracle, obligation_tracker,
  operator_intelligence, perf_budget_guard, policy_checkpoint,
  region_ownership, retention_policy, saga, supervision,
  tiered_trust_storage, transport_fault_gate, trust_fabric, trust_zone)
- control_plane/ (audience_token, cancellation_injection,
  control_lane_mapping, control_lane_policy, divergence_gate,
  epoch_transition_barrier, evidence_replay_gate, key_role_separation,
  marker_stream, mmr_proofs)
- extensions/ (artifact_contract)
- migration/ (bpet_migration_gate, dgis_migration_gate)
- observability/ (witness_ref)
- ops/ (engine_dispatcher)
- perf/ (optimization_governor)
- policy/ (approval_workflow, compatibility_gate, guardrail_monitor,
  hardening_clamps, hardening_state_machine, object_class_tuning,
  perf_budget_guard)
- remote/ (computation_registry, eviction_saga, idempotency_store,
  virtual_transport_faults)
- repair/ (proof_carrying_decode)
- replay/ (time_travel_engine)
- runtime/ (checkpoint, epoch_transition, hardware_planner, incident_lab,
  isolation_mesh, lane_scheduler, lockstep_harness, nversion_oracle,
  region_tree)
- security/ (adversary_graph, constant_time, degraded_mode_policy,
  intent_firewall, remote_cap, ssrf_policy, staking_governance,
  trust_complexity)
- storage/ (frankensqlite_adapter, retrievability_gate)
- supply_chain/ (category_shift, extension_registry, migration_kit,
  revocation_integration, revocation_registry, trust_card)
- testing/ (lab_runtime, scenario_builder)
- tools/ (25 tool modules)
- verifier_economy/ (mod)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
